where.if: AND ( t.scope_type = 3 OR (t.scope_type = 1 AND t.scope_value = (SELECT class_name FROM student WHERE student_id = #{studentId})) OR (t.scope_type = 2 AND t.scope_value IN (SELECT CAST(team_id AS CHAR) FROM team_member WHERE student_id = #{studentId})) )

mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, tm.teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.sign_status != 0) AS signed_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id) AS total_count FROM attendance_task t LEFT JOIN teacher tm ON t.teacher_id = tm.teacher_id
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT t.*, tm.teacher_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id AND r.sign_status != 0) AS signed_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_record r WHERE r.task_id = t.task_id) AS total_count FROM attendance_task t LEFT JOIN teacher tm ON t.teacher_id = tm.teacher_id WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId}
